datasets.name: 35341dc1
queryLines:
select 'ALL' as policy_id
union all
select distinct policy_id
from
  hurcy.default.instance_workload_profiles_tb as tr
  where policy_id is not null

datasets.name: 0d52ef71
queryLines:
-- #####################################################################
-- 대시보드 데이터셋 쿼리
-- #####################################################################
-- 아래 쿼리들은 파이프라인 외부(Lakeview 대시보드)에서 실행한다.
-- MV가 파이프라인 target catalog/schema에 배포된 후,
-- 대시보드에서 전체 경로(예: hurcy.default.instance_workload_profiles_mv)로
-- 참조한다.
--
-- Dashboard Parameters:
--   :start_date  - 조회 시작일 (DATE)
--   :end_date    - 조회 종료일 (DATE)
--   :policy_id   - 클러스터 정책 ID 필터 (MULTI STRING)
-- #####################################################################


-- =====================================================================
-- 대시보드 1: 클러스터 워크로드 프로파일 개요
-- =====================================================================
-- 클러스터 단위 집계: 워크로드 프로파일별 활용률, 실행시간, 비용.
-- 대시보드 "Cluster profiles" 페이지용 데이터셋.
-- =====================================================================

SELECT
  c.workspace_id,
  c.cluster_id,
  c.cluster_name,
  c.cluster_source,
  c.workload_profile,
  c.policy_id,
  c.owned_by,
  c.worker_node_type,
  c.configured_workers,
  c.min_autoscale_workers,
  c.max_autoscale_workers,
  c.dbr_version,

  MIN(c.instance_start_time)                          AS cluster_start_time,
  MAX(c.instance_end_time)                            AS cluster_end_time,
  DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(c.instance_start_time),
                   MAX(c.instance_end_time))          AS cluster_execution_minutes,

  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_node_count), 2)                     AS avg_node_count_per_minute,
  ROUND(MAX(c.max_node_count), 2)                     AS max_node_count_per_minute,

  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_cpu_util), 2)                        AS avg_cpu_util_per_cluster,
  ROUND(MAX(c.max_cpu_util), 2)                        AS max_cpu_util_per_cluster,
  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_cpu_wait), 2)                        AS avg_cpu_wait_per_cluster,
  ROUND(MAX(c.max_cpu_wait), 2)                        AS max_cpu_wait_per_cluster,
  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_mem_util), 2)                        AS avg_mem_util_per_cluster,
  ROUND(MAX(c.max_mem_util), 2)                        AS max_mem_util_per_cluster,
  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_net_mb_rec_minute), 2)               AS avg_net_mb_rec_minute_per_cluster,
  ROUND(AVG(c.avg_net_mb_sent_minute), 2)              AS avg_net_mb_sent_minute_per_cluster,

  ROUND(SUM(DISTINCT c.total_dbus), 4)                 AS total_dbus,
  ROUND(SUM(DISTINCT c.total_cost_usd), 2)             AS total_cost_usd
FROM hurcy.default.instance_workload_profiles_mv AS c
WHERE 
   c.instance_start_time >= :start_date
   AND c.instance_end_time   <  :end_date
  AND (
    :policy_id is null
    OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:policy_id, c.policy_id)
  )
GROUP BY
  c.workspace_id,
  c.cluster_id,
  c.cluster_name,
  c.cluster_source,
  c.workload_profile,
  c.policy_id,
  c.owned_by,
  c.worker_node_type,
  c.configured_workers,
  c.min_autoscale_workers,
  c.max_autoscale_workers,
  c.dbr_version
ORDER BY
  workload_profile DESC,
  total_cost_usd DESC,
  cluster_execution_minutes DESC;

datasets.name: 080e18ac
queryLines:
-- =====================================================================
-- 대시보드 2: 잡 클러스터 워크로드 프로파일 상세
-- =====================================================================
-- 잡 실행 단위로 인스턴스별 활용률, 비용, 메트릭 임계치를 보여준다.
-- 대시보드 "Instance profile" 페이지용 데이터셋.
-- =====================================================================

SELECT
  tr.job_id,
  tr.job_name,
  tr.run_id,
  tr.job_run_id,
  tr.task_key,
  tr.period_start_time,
  tr.period_end_time,
  DATEDIFF(MINUTE, tr.period_start_time, tr.period_end_time) AS task_run_duration_minutes,
  tr.workload_profile,
  tr.policy_id,
  tr.cluster_id,
  tr.cluster_name,
  tr.cluster_source,
  tr.instance_id,
  tr.driver,
  tr.node_type,
  tr.instance_start_time,
  tr.instance_end_time,

  tr.avg_node_count,
  tr.max_node_count,
  tr.stddev_node_count,

  tr.avg_cpu_util,
  tr.max_cpu_util,
  tr.avg_cpu_wait,
  tr.max_cpu_wait,
  tr.avg_mem_util,
  tr.max_mem_util,
  tr.avg_net_mb_rec_minute,
  tr.avg_net_mb_sent_minute,

  tr.total_dbus,
  tr.total_cost_usd,

  CASE
    WHEN tr.avg_cpu_util < 30  THEN 'cpu_low_threshold (<30%)'
    WHEN tr.avg_cpu_util <= 60 THEN 'cpu_mid_threshold (<=60%)'
    WHEN tr.avg_cpu_util > 60  THEN 'cpu_high_threshold (>60%)'
  END AS cpu_metric_level,
  CASE
    WHEN tr.avg_mem_util < 40  THEN 'mem_low_threshold (<40%)'
    WHEN tr.avg_mem_util <= 60 THEN 'mem_mid_threshold (<=60%)'
    WHEN tr.avg_mem_util > 60  THEN 'mem_high_threshold (>60%)'
  END AS mem_metric_level
FROM hurcy.default.instance_workload_profiles_mv AS tr
WHERE tr.period_start_time >= :start_date
  AND tr.period_end_time   <  :end_date
  AND (
    :policy_id is null
    OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:policy_id, tr.policy_id)
  )
ORDER BY
  total_cost_usd DESC,
  workload_profile DESC,
  task_run_duration_minutes DESC;

datasets.name: 2b3cbec0
queryLines:
-- =====================================================================
-- 대시보드 3: 라이트사이징 권고
-- =====================================================================
-- 클러스터별 활용률을 집계하고, 자동화된 사이징 분류와 예상 절감액을
-- 제시한다.
-- =====================================================================

WITH cluster_summary AS (
  SELECT
    workspace_id,
    cluster_id,
    cluster_name,
    cluster_source,
    owned_by,
    worker_node_type,
    configured_workers,
    min_autoscale_workers,
    max_autoscale_workers,
    dbr_version,
    policy_id,
    workload_profile,

    ROUND(AVG(avg_cpu_util), 2)                        AS avg_cpu_percent,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(avg_cpu_util, 0.95), 2)    AS p95_cpu_percent,
    ROUND(MAX(max_cpu_util), 2)                        AS max_cpu_percent,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_mem_util), 2)                        AS avg_mem_percent,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(avg_mem_util, 0.95), 2)    AS p95_mem_percent,
    ROUND(MAX(max_mem_util), 2)                        AS max_mem_percent,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_cpu_wait), 2)                        AS avg_cpu_wait_percent,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_net_mb_rec_minute), 2)               AS avg_net_mb_rec,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_net_mb_sent_minute), 2)              AS avg_net_mb_sent,

    ROUND(AVG(avg_node_count), 2)                      AS avg_node_count,
    ROUND(MAX(max_node_count), 2)                      AS max_node_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id)                        AS total_instances,
    COUNT(DISTINCT job_id)                             AS distinct_job_count,

    ROUND(SUM(DISTINCT total_dbus), 4)                 AS total_dbus,
    ROUND(SUM(DISTINCT total_cost_usd), 2)             AS total_cost_usd
  FROM hurcy.default.instance_workload_profiles_mv
  WHERE instance_start_time >= :start_date
    AND instance_end_time   <  :end_date
    AND (
      :policy_id is null
      OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(:policy_id, policy_id)
    )
  GROUP BY
    workspace_id, cluster_id, cluster_name, cluster_source,
    owned_by, worker_node_type, configured_workers,
    min_autoscale_workers, max_autoscale_workers,
    dbr_version, policy_id, workload_profile
)

SELECT
  *,

  CASE
    WHEN p95_cpu_percent < 20 AND p95_mem_percent < 30
      THEN 'STRONGLY_OVERSIZED'
    WHEN avg_cpu_percent < 30 AND avg_mem_percent < 40
      THEN 'POTENTIALLY_OVERSIZED'
    WHEN p95_cpu_percent > 90 OR p95_mem_percent > 90
      THEN 'POTENTIALLY_UNDERSIZED'
    WHEN avg_cpu_wait_percent > 10
      THEN 'IO_BOTTLENECK'
    ELSE 'APPROPRIATE'
  END AS sizing_signal,

  CASE
    WHEN p95_cpu_percent < 20 AND p95_mem_percent < 30
      THEN 'P95 CPU/Memory 모두 매우 낮음. 노드 타입 축소 또는 워커 수 감소를 강력 권고.'
    WHEN avg_cpu_percent < 30 AND avg_mem_percent < 40
      THEN '평균 CPU/Memory 낮음. 더 작은 구성으로 전환 검토 필요.'
    WHEN p95_cpu_percent > 90 OR p95_mem_percent > 90
      THEN 'P95 리소스 사용률이 한계에 근접. 노드 타입 확대 또는 워커 추가 검토.'
    WHEN avg_cpu_wait_percent > 10
      THEN 'CPU I/O 대기가 높음. 스토리지 최적화 또는 디스크 성능 개선 권고.'
    ELSE '현재 사이징이 워크로드에 적합함.'
  END AS recommendation,

  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN avg_cpu_percent < 30 AND avg_mem_percent < 40
        THEN total_cost_usd * (1.0 - GREATEST(avg_cpu_percent, avg_mem_percent) / 100.0) * 0.5
      ELSE 0
    END, 2
  ) AS estimated_savings_usd

FROM cluster_summary
ORDER BY total_cost_usd DESC;

lines: # Monitor Job cluster utilization and adjust job cluster policy.

frame.title: Cluster workload profile distribution per policy_id except policy_id is null
Total Cost Breakdown by Sizing Signal
